description: [wc] - Print newline, word, and byte counts for each file. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Print the number of lines entirely
commands.explanation: Executes the wc routine logically to process: print the number of lines entirely

commands.description: Print the exact number of words
commands.explanation: Executes the wc routine logically to process: print the exact number of words
Executes the wc routine logically to process: print the explicit byte count
